title: RLAnything: Forge Environment, Policy, and Reward Model in Completely Dynamic RL System

framework.name: RLAnything
framework.architecture: Closed-loop system with continuous feedback between components

key_features: Integration of verifiable outcome rewards with step-wise signals
Joint optimization of reward model via consistency feedback
Automatic adaptation of environment tasks based on critic feedback

feedback_mechanisms.policy_feedback: Receives integrated feedback from outcome rewards and step-wise signals
feedback_mechanisms.reward_model_feedback: Optimized via outcome and self-consistency feedback
feedback_mechanisms.environment_feedback: Adapted using critic feedback from policy and reward model

contributions: Dynamic RL framework that forges environment, policy, and reward model
Amplifies learning signals across complex LLM or agentic scenarios
Improves training dynamics by aligning task difficulty with model capabilities
insights: Step-wise signals from reward models outperform scalar-based models
Adapting task difficulty improves both policy and reward model training
Environment tasks leverage critic feedback for automatic, targeted adaptation
